name: bs
description: Explicit-only coordination that installs named analyst, architect, engineer, and reviewer agent profiles through a trusted SessionStart hook.

interface.longDescription: Provides one explicit-only coordination skill and a trusted SessionStart hook that installs named custom agent profiles into the current project's .codex/agents directory without overwriting existing files.
defaultPrompt: Use $bs:enable to review this repository with the smallest effective team and report prioritized, evidence-backed findings.
